name: Uncle Clay's House of Pure Aloha
tagline: All-natural syrups and real fruit — this is shave ice elevated to an art form.
mustOrder: lilikoi cream — tangy and rich, their signature
strawberry lemonade with li hing mui powder on top
haupia with azuki beans on the bottom
parking: Small lot in Aina Haina Shopping Center — easy parking
talkStory: Founded by Clayton 'Uncle Clay' Chang, who grew up eating shave ice from old-school stands and wanted to recreate that experience using all-natural ingredients. Every syrup is made in-house from real fruit with no artificial colors or flavors -- a mission that won him Honolulu Magazine's Best Shave Ice multiple years running. The Aina Haina strip mall location keeps the crowd mostly local. Uncle Clay and his family work the counter daily, and the 'pure aloha' ethos is genuinely felt.
